pi_items.source: Reverse geocoding using geopy (Nominatim) confirmed that coordinates (-33.8688, 151.2093) fall in Sydney CBD, New South Wales, Australia.
Reverse geocoding using geopy (Nominatim) confirmed that latitude -33.8688 correctly points to Sydney, Australia.
Reverse geocoding using geopy (Nominatim) confirmed that longitude 151.2093 correctly points to Sydney, Australia.

privileged_info_summary: Verified via Nominatim reverse geocoding that the target coordinates (-33.8688, 151.2093) accurately map to Sydney, Australia. Analyzed the associated world_survey.gpkg file, confirming it contains real-world spatial datasets including world capitals and GBIF biodiversity field observations, thereby validating the data as non-synthetic.
